title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Moderate thunderstorms are possible for E Poland.

#
E Poland
Moderate thudnerstorms are possible in E parts of Poland as the jet streams slams into Poland. CAPE and Dew point values, aswell as LLS and DLS values are suitable enough for moderate storm environment.
The main threats are hail, strong wind gusts and heavy rain.
an isolated weak tornado threat cant be ruled out if a cell strengthens and remains discrete.

SLGT
Poland
Thunderstorms to isolated moderate thunderstorms are expected in the region. The main threats are small hail, heavy rain, strong wind gusts.

The initiation and coverage is not exactly known so confidence remains low, but this setup deserves more than a GNRL risk.
